description: Hard trigger: Heart rate exceeds (220 - age) * 0.90 threshold
prerequisite: users.birth_year must be set (e.g. 1990 → age 36 → max HR 165.6); emergency contact with notify_on containing 'hard_high_hr'
expected_outcome: HARD_TRIGGER → EmergencyService.fire → App push + SMS + Twilio call
